name: krakend
tagline: An API gateway and aggregator for managing and scaling microservices
description: KrakenD CE is an API gateway and aggregator that sits in front of microservices. It combines and transforms responses, handles rate limiting and authentication, and lets teams define configurations as code for scalable API front ends.

features.title: API Gateway
features.description: Route and aggregate requests to backend services

features.title: Request Aggregation
features.description: Combine responses from multiple services into one endpoint

features.title: Traffic Management
features.description: Control request flow and routing behavior

features.title: Configuration-Based Setup
features.description: Define gateway behavior using configuration files

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the API gateway on your own infrastructure
